allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); s=d.get\('result',{}\).get\('scratchOrgs',[]\); print\(json.dumps\([{'alias':o.get\('alias'\),'username':o.get\('username'\),'status':o.get\('status'\),'connectedStatus':o.get\('connectedStatus'\),'isDefault':o.get\('isDefaultUsername'\),'expirationDate':o.get\('expirationDate'\)} for o in s], indent=2\)\)")
